generated_pair.question: What are the three required headers that must be included in all requests to the Claude API?
supporting_sentences: All requests to the Claude API must include these headers:
Header | Value | Required
x-api-key | Your API key from Console | Yes
anthropic-version | API version (e.g., 2023-06-01) | Yes
content-type | application/json | Yes
